segments.text: Looks like he's covering everything by himself
segments.original_text: すべて自分の自力でカバーということなんでしょうね

segments.text: If the greatsword's been paying off that much so far
segments.original_text: かなり大剣を今まで得してたら

segments.text: I'd say it's Zakray's side of things
segments.original_text: まあザクレイ選手の方かなという

full_text: Looks like he's covering everything by himself If the greatsword's been paying off that much so far I'd say it's Zakray's side of things Ohhhhh! Cancel read!

corrections.rule: player name: ザクル→ザクレイ
